positive: A stylized, minimalist silhouette illustration of a cosmic raccoon standing on the crescent moon, holding a delicate lantern. The raccoon has expressive, playful pose, surrounded by swirling nebula dust and stylized stars. The overall composition is highly symmetrical and centered, emphasizing strong contrast between the deep space blues and purples and the bright, glowing cyan accents. Clean linework, graphic design aesthetic, vector style, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Studio lighting, highly detailed, high contrast.
